title: Simple Survival Extension
description: An expansion of items and weapons in the original Minecraft style!
body:
The Simple Survival extension comes with a simple proposal, as the name suggests, to add new items, objectives and improve the exploration of the world, adding new weapons, tools, without compromising the aesthetics of the game or leaving the player bored by the difficulty of progressing with the mod.

For more information and updates or mod ideas, join my [Discord server!](https://discord.gg/dpkwQ4wGRe)

![Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aa8c09b9ee1b2fc4a1cfc0936a454367697dc9a.png)

This mod was created for NeoForge and has no date to be updated/compatible with Fabric or any other mod loader.

![All item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef76e7ef0ef12f6bbd27e4d96d9bfc85f8f56ee9.png)

Mod updates may take a while since there is only one person (me) working on it. The mod is being made in MCreator, so updates to new versions may take a while. Hope you like it and have fun!
